summary: Comprehensive testing of TextileTrace Portal - JWT Authentication with RBAC, all 4 role-based dashboards, registration flow, and protected routes. All features working correctly with real backend API connected to MongoDB.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Role-based navigation sidebar correctly changes based on user role
Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users to login
Toast notifications provide good user feedback on login/logout
seed_data_creation: Demo users already created with approved status
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core authentication and dashboard flows working correctly. Backend API fully functional with real MongoDB. All 4 demo user logins verified working. Role-based access control properly implemented. Protected routes redirect to login when unauthenticated. Registration creates users in pending status (except admin). Future testing can focus on batch CRUD operations, shipment tracking, audit workflows.

login_flow.notes: All 4 demo credential buttons work correctly

features: Pending Approvals list with Approve button
Quick Actions (New Batch, Add Production, Create Shipment, Upload TC)
Quick Actions (View Traceability, Request Audit, View Reports, Track Shipments)

registration_flow.notes: Non-admin users created with pending status

protected_routes.notes: Unauthenticated users redirected to login page

logout_functionality.notes: Logout button available in all dashboards, redirects to login page
